text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Well, cake's a must, and then pizza, pasta, 
curry, and hamburg steaks would be nice too.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, don't forget 'bout the sushi! 
Can't have a celebration without it!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Then how about we make our own sushi rolls? 
If we get a bunch of ingredients, it'll be fun. 
What else…

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Uh, before we get ahead of ourselves, 
isn't this gonna be a bit much? Maybe your 
birthday might be a good time to practice 
some self-control.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hm? What's the matter, Oguri? 
Not a peep outta the birthday girl?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Are you perhaps not feeling well? 
You shouldn't push yourself.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
No, it's just… Seeing you two rack your brains 
over something like this just for me, I get this 
feeling in my chest…

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
…Ah, it's almost like I've just had 
a filling meal. I feel content.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oguri…! We're going to make lots and lots 
of food — just you wait!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Gah! All right, no more talk of self-control 
from me! Go wild!!
